sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87652" key="prokatagwni/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκατᾰγωνίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n87652.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overcome, defeat first,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πᾶν τὸ ψεῦδος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:12p.447M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12p.447M.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
